prompt: Create a multi-agent setup with pydantic-ai where a main orchestrator agent delegates research tasks to a specialist research agent. The research agent should use a different cheaper model. Track token usage across both agents. The orchestrator should return a typed Report model with title, findings (list of strings), and summary.

assertions.text: Two separate Agent instances defined at module level
Agents use different model identifiers (e.g. gpt-5.2 vs gpt-5-mini or similar cost split)
Main agent has a @agent.tool that calls the research agent via await research_agent.run()
Delegation passes usage=ctx.usage for token tracking aggregation
Report BaseModel defined with title (str), findings (list[str]), and summary (str) fields
Tool function uses RunContext with proper generic type parameter
